content:
## OpenCode SDK
- Cliente JS/TS tipado para o servidor opencode. `npm install @opencode-ai/sdk`
- `createOpencode(options)` inicia servidor + cliente. `createOpencodeClient(options)` só cliente.
- Opções: hostname, port, signal, timeout, config
- Saída estruturada JSON via `format: { type: "json_schema", schema: {...} }`
- APIs: Global (health), App (log, agents), Project (list, current), Path, Config, Sessions, Files (find.text, find.files, find.symbols, file.read, file.status), TUI (appendPrompt, submitPrompt, showToast, etc), Auth, Events

## OpenCode Server
- `opencode serve [--port] [--hostname] [--cors] [--mdns]`
- Autenticação: `OPENCODE_SERVER_PASSWORD` e `OPENCODE_SERVER_USERNAME`
- Servidor HTTP sem cabeça. Endpoint OpenAPI 3.1 em `/doc`
- APIs REST: Global, Project, Path & VCS, Config, Provider (OAuth), Sessions (CRUD, fork, share, diff, revert, permissions), Messages, Commands, Files, LSP, Formatter, MCP (add dinâmico), Agents, Log, TUI, Auth, Events, Doc

## OpenCode Plugins
- Locais: `.opencode/plugins/` (projeto) ou `~/.config/opencode/plugins/` (global)
- npm: especificar em `opencode.json` campo "plugin"
- Instalação automática via Bun, cache em `~/.cache/opencode/node_modules/`
- Plugin exporta função que recebe `{ project, client, $, directory, worktree }`
- Suporta TypeScript com tipos `@opencode-ai/plugin`
- Eventos: command.executed, file.edited, lsp.updated, message.updated, permission.asked, session.*, tool.execute.before/after, shell.env, tui.*
- Ferramentas customizadas: `tool({ description, args: tool.schema.string(), execute })`
- Hook compactação: `experimental.session.compacting`

## OpenCode Ecossistema
- Plugins: opencode-daytona, opencode-helicone-session, opencode-openai-codex-auth, opencode-gemini-auth, opencode-antigravity-auth, opencode-devcontainers, opencode-dynamic-context-pruning, opencode-websearch-cited, opencode-shell-strategy, opencode-wakatime, opencode-morph-plugin, oh-my-opencode, opencode-skillful, opencode-supermemory, opencode-scheduler, opencode-background-agents, opencode-worktree, opencode-sentry-monitor, opencode-notificator, opencode-notifier
- Projetos: kimaki (Discord bot), opencode.nvim (Neovim), portal (web UI), OpenChamber (Web/Desktop/VS Code), OpenCode-Obsidian, OpenWork (alternativa Claude Cowork), ocx (extensão manager), CodeNomad (Desktop/Web/Mobile)
- Agentes: Agentic (agentes modulares), opencode-agents (configs/prompts/plugins)
